title: TraceAI
description: Agentic deep-research platform that maps knowledge as a structured graph — concepts, hypotheses, evidence, issues — with every AI response grounded in what you have already established. No hallucination by design.
impact: Ontology graph · Per-node AI threads · Voice input · Undo/redo

title: Sansad — Indian Election Strategy Game
description: Browser-based turn-based political simulation built around the 2024 Indian General Election. Pick a real party, manage alliances, place candidates across all 543 Lok Sabha seats, and fight to 272 with an AI advisor commenting on your strategy.

title: Trek Recommendation System
description: ML-powered web application that recommends hiking and trekking destinations from a database of 208+ treks using content-based filtering with cosine similarity. Originally a freelance project, open-sourced in 2022.
